headline: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics Expands Alzheimer's Portfolio with CE-Marked p-Tau217 Blood Test and New High-Specificity Research Assay
summary: Beckman Coulter Diagnostics, a global leader in clinical diagnostics and a Danaher company, today announced it received CE Mark under IVDR for its Access p-Tau217 assay, a blood test designed to support clinical evaluation of amyloid pathology in patients with signs and symptoms of cognitive decline. The company also introduced its high-specificity Access BD-pTau217 Research Use Only (RUO) assay at the Alzheimer's Association International Conference (AAIC) 2026 in London.
